diagnosis: The agent is stopping too early and returning a superficially plausible but imprecise entity instead of verifying the exact requested relation.

mutations_tried.rationale: Tighten the instructions so the agent verifies the exact answer type and relationship, not just a nearby fact.
One extra search step may help confirm the precise phrasing when the first result is close but not exact.
A brief self-check can help catch near-miss answers where the agent has found a related fact but not the exact requested one.

diagnosis: The agent is answering too early and often returns the wrong entity or too-literal phrasing instead of verifying the exact requested fact.

mutations_tried.rationale: Strengthen the instruction to verify the exact target relation and answer in the same level of abstraction as the question, not a nearby entity or paraphrase.
A self-check step may help catch near-miss answers where the agent picks a plausible but non-matching entity or label.
A slightly larger search budget can help the agent confirm the exact wording and avoid premature closure on ambiguous multi-hop questions.

diagnosis: The agent is answering with a related but non-matching entity or designation instead of the exact target label.

mutations_tried.rationale: Tighten the instruction to force exact matching of the asked-for abstraction and to avoid substituting nearby specifics from the source.
A small increase in search budget can help verify whether the apparent specific detail is actually part of a broader designation or just a nearby distractor.
A reflection pass may help catch cases where the first plausible match is narrower or different from the queried label.

diagnosis: The agent finds the right source but answers with a nearby related label instead of the exact requested abstraction.

mutations_tried.rationale: A little more search budget can help compare candidate descriptions and confirm the exact designation asked for.
Strengthen the instruction to map evidence to the exact answer type requested and to avoid over-specific or adjacent labels when a broader entity is asked for.
A brief self-check may help the agent notice when it has selected a related but non-equivalent answer label.

diagnosis: The agent is stopping after finding a nearby match and failing to verify the exact designation asked for.

mutations_tried.rationale: Strengthen the instruction to cross-check the exact label in source text and not answer from the first plausible related designation.
A small increase can give the agent one more search to compare candidate pages and confirm the exact designation.
A reflection step can help catch premature selection of a plausible-but-wrong label before finalizing.

diagnosis: The agent is latching onto the first matching school reference and answering with the wrong designation instead of verifying the exact label asked for.

mutations_tried.rationale: Strengthen the instruction to cross-check the requested designation against the source text and avoid accepting a nearby but different school classification.
An extra search or two can help compare multiple references and confirm the exact school designation instead of stopping at the first plausible result.
A brief self-check may help catch when the agent has matched the right location but the wrong designation.
